summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QA Engineer Portfolio after code quality refactoring. All components render correctly, APIs working, navigation intact, no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: All refactored components (AnimatedBackground, ProfileImage, StatCard, HighlightCard, KeyFocusCard, CurrentWorkCard, CategoryCard, CertificateCard, SocialLink, LoadingSpinner) render correctly
React hooks properly use useCallback with correct dependency arrays in Navbar.jsx
GitHub service refactored with _get_required_projects and _build_project_object methods working correctly
Webpack deprecation warnings in frontend logs are non-blocking (related to react-scripts version)
test_credentials: No authentication required for this portfolio app
seed_data_creation: Portfolio data already seeded in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All refactored components verified working. Backend APIs (/api/, /api/portfolio, /api/projects, /api/contact, /api/seed-data) all functional. Certificate category pages (/certificates/seminars, /certificates/internships, /certificates/courses) navigate correctly and display individual certificates with Google Drive links. Mobile responsiveness working with hamburger menu. No console errors detected.

backend_tests.portfolio_endpoint: PASS - Returns personalInfo, technologies, roadmapEvents, certificates
backend_tests.projects_endpoint: PASS - Returns 4 specific GitHub repos in correct order
backend_tests.contact_endpoint: PASS - Form submission works, validation returns 422 for missing fields

frontend_tests.hero_section: PASS - Profile image, animated background, stat cards visible
frontend_tests.about_section: PASS - Bio, expertise cards, key focus areas, current work visible
frontend_tests.projects_section: PASS - All 4 projects (Driver_Feature, Edura_Hub, Highway-Traffic-Game, Unit-Conversion) displayed
frontend_tests.technologies_section: PASS - All 6 categories (Languages, Web, Backend/APIs, Auth, Testing, AI/LLM) with tech pills
frontend_tests.certificate_category_pages: PASS - All 3 category pages load with individual certificates and Google Drive links
frontend_tests.footer: PASS - Social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Instagram, Email), Download Resume button, quick links
frontend_tests.navbar: PASS - All navigation items work, smooth scroll to sections
frontend_tests.mobile_responsiveness: PASS - Hamburger menu opens, navigation items visible

mocked_apis_note: certificates.json contains static Google Drive links as requested by user - this is intentional, not a bug
